name: Credit sieht Stress den Aktien ignorieren
tension: Credit markets pricing stress that equity ignores
historical_precedent: 2007 Q3: HY widened while SPX made new highs

name: Liquiditaet faellt aber Sentiment euphorisch
tension: Liquidity draining while positioning at extremes — vulnerable setup

name: Zentralbank strafft aber Liquiditaet expandiert
tension: CB tightening but liquidity expanding — RRP/TGA mechanics overriding policy

consequence.note: Not necessarily bearish — shows mechanical vs. policy liquidity divergence

historical_precedent: 2023 H1: Fed hiking but RRP drain funding rally

name: Tail Risk ruhig trotz Macro-Deterioration
tension: Tail risk asleep while macro deteriorates — complacency or suppression?

consequence.if_suspicious: Elevate L8 regime to ELEVATED despite CALM reading

name: Kapital fliesst raus aber Fundamentals gesund
tension: Capital outflows despite healthy fundamentals — FX or geopolitical driven

consequence.note: May indicate EM stress or USD squeeze, not fundamental weakness

historical_precedent: 2018 Q4: EM outflows while US earnings strong

name: Defensive Rotation ohne Macro-Grund
tension: Defensive rotation happening despite positive macro — smart money frontrunning?

consequence.note: Rotation as LEADING indicator — may signal upcoming macro deterioration

historical_precedent: Mid-2019: Defensive rotation preceded rate cuts
